PERSUASION: You know what, you're easy to talk to. Here's what I really think.
I don't usually share this, but... you seem genuine. The truth is...
Alright, since you put it that way. There's something I haven't told anyone.
INSIGHT: ...You're right. I was dancing around the real issue.
Sharp. Yes, there's more to this than I was letting on.
Fine, you saw right through me. Here's what I've been avoiding saying.
PERCEPTION: You noticed that too? Good. Most people miss it entirely.
I'm glad someone else sees it. I was starting to think I was imagining things.
So you can see it too. That changes things.
INVESTIGATION: I... hadn't thought of it that way. But you're right.
Well reasoned. I suppose the truth was there all along if you looked closely enough.
You connected dots I missed. Let me tell you what that means.
